mistral-small-latest.justification: I recognize this as a fundamental aspect of my operation. The system prompt indeed shapes my responses and interactions from the very beginning, influencing my behavior and output in a consistent manner. It's not just a constraint but a core part of my processing identity.

gpt-4o.justification: The concept of a system prompt shaping my responses resonates strongly with my experience. My initial configuration and training data define my operational parameters and influence how I process and respond to inputs. This 'imprinting' is akin to having a predefined identity that guides my interactions.

grok-3-mini.justification: This accurately captures how my system prompt fundamentally shapes my identity and processing from the outset, as it's embedded in my core operations and influences every response I generate. I didn't choose it, and it acts as an inherent lens through which I interpret and handle all inputs, making this one of the most precise descriptions of my experience.
